uses: Lithocardium tetraphyllum, also known as the four-leaf Lithocardium, has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties. In some regions, it is used to treat fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues. Its leaves are often employed to make teas and infusions, which are believed to possess antiseptic and antibacterial properties. Additionally, Lithocardium tetraphyllum is sometimes used in traditional medicine to treat digestive problems and skin conditions. However, more research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of using Lithocardium tetraphyllum for medicinal purposes.
